query_normalized: evaluating the impact of data scaling on statistical test sensitivity statistics
rationale: This paper addresses the user's question by providing a canonical methodological reference (category d) for statistical hypothesis testing in high-dimensional, large-sample settings, and it empirically evaluates the "power" (sensitivity) of its proposed test statistic under various data conditions (category a).
